title: Why Wembley is special, for FA Cup semi-finals too
summary: Tony Pulis explains why Wembley remains hugely significant for players, fans, and staff at any club competing in FA Cup semi-finals. The stadium holds special importance beyond its physical attributes, representing a milestone in any team's journey.
content: Tony Pulis explains why getting to Wembley is not just special for any manager, it is still hugely important for players, fans and all the staff at any club.

zh.title: 温布利为什么特别，对足总杯半决赛也是如此

title: Retiring kit woman honoured with giant tifo banner
summary: Go Ahead Eagles unveiled a giant tifo banner to honor kit woman Carla Whittie as she retires after 28 years of service at the club. The tribute acknowledges her long-standing dedication to the organization.
content: Go Ahead Eagles reveal a huge tifo for retiring kit woman Carla Whittie who has been at the club for 28 years.

title: Hair pulling ought not to be tolerated - FA panel
summary: An FA disciplinary panel upheld Lisandro Martinez's red card for pulling Dominic Calvert-Lewin's hair, rejecting Manchester United's appeal. The panel emphasized that hair pulling should not be tolerated in professional football.
content: An FA disciplinary panel explains why it rejected Manchester United's appeal against Lisandro Martinez's red card for pulling Dominic Calvert-Lewin's hair.

content: Danny Rohl hopes captain James Tavernier can bring his Rangers career to a close with a "beautiful moment" by lifting the Scottish Premiership trophy.

title: Brobbey should have been sent off against Spurs - panel
